political.s: FEC: $119K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 6 executive donors.

charity.focus: Education, child safety, youth development, health, human services

environment.s: Climate-commitment coalition member: First Movers Coalition (since 2022). First Movers Coalition: 10%+ near-zero primary steel + aluminum by 2030.

labor.s: Corporate Human Rights Benchmark (Automotive): 14.6/26 on UN Guiding Principles assessment (policy, due diligence, remedy, and serious-allegation response).

privacy.s: State regulator action: OH AG (most recent 2025-12-22). ~$150.0M in known settlements. AG Yost Announces $150 Million Settlement with Mercedes-Benz over Illegal Emissions

wiki.extract: Mercedes-Benz USA (MBUSA) is the distributor for Mercedes-Benz passenger cars in the United States, headquartered in Sandy Springs, a suburb of Atlanta, Georgia.

cases.caseName: Burton v. Mercedes Benz USA, LLC
Burton v. Mercedes Benz USA, LLC

health.s: Consumer Reports 2026 Brand Report Card: ranked #14 of ~26 auto brands.

governance.s: Wikidata: owned by Mercedes-Benz Group; HQ Dunwoody. (Wikidata Q1921337)

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the warehouse while carrying a pallet between two aisles of pallets, tripped on the end of a pallet, and fell to the concrete floor. The employee sustained a left hip fracture and a left elbow fracture.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by discharged object or substance
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was holding a hydraulic press in place under a vehicle that was on a lift. A pinhole opening developed and hydraulic fluid shot out at 400 psi into his left hand.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall or jump from vehicle in normal operation, nonroadway
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee fell from the running board of a moving vehicle. His head struck the concrete resulting in a laceration and concussion.

sampleRecords.employer: Mercedes-Benz North America Central Warehouse (NACW) NO TRUCKS
sampleRecords.event_description: Part of occupant s body caught between vehicle and other object in nonroadway transport incident
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was participating in a forklift operator training when their left foot was pinned between the vehicle and a metal storage rack. The employee's left foot was fractured and lacerated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking across the showroom floor when he slipped and fell, injuring his knee.
